methodology: Skeptical Functional Verification Playbook v1 — only real execution counts

severity_legend.P0: Broken core path, data loss, security hole, fake success
severity_legend.P1: Feature claimed but non-functional for main users

issues.title: Admin students API hardcoded totalSections: 10 (course has 52)
issues.root_cause: Legacy 10-section course denominator left after V3 expansion to 52 sections; students route mixed denominators (label 10, pct 52), export used /10 entirely.
issues.blast_radius: Admin dashboard progress bars, CSV export % Completado, any consumer of totalSections field. Free-plan maxSections=5 is intentional product limit (not this bug).
issues.fix: Import COURSE_META.totalSections (52) as single source of truth in both routes.

validation_after.source_assert: no totalSections: 10, no / 10) in admin routes

issues.title: Footer/marketing claimed 11 or 13 sections instead of 52
issues.root_cause: Copy not updated when COURSE_META.totalSections grew to 52.
issues.fix: Updated all three strings to '52 secciones'.

issues.title: Google/GitHub OAuth buttons show toast 'OAuth no configurado' without GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID
issues.assessment: NOT fake success: buttons honestly refuse and point to credentials demo. Core auth (credentials register/login) proven live. Residual deploy config, not ship-blocker for course.
issues.recommended_monitoring: Configure OAuth secrets in production env if social login is marketed as available.

false_positives_from_v1_scan.note: v1 registry flagged Spanish word 'Todo'/'Todos' and CSS placeholder: classes as TODOs — discarded as noise
